vendor_profile.questionnaire_completed_by: Jordan Leví, Director of Enterprise Sales
vendor_profile.registered_address: 340 Pine Street, Suite 800, San Francisco, CA 94104, USA

attestation.attested_by: Jordan Leví, Director of Enterprise Sales
attestation.statement: Information provided is accurate and complete to the best of my knowledge as of the submission date.

product_and_integration.solution_name: OptiChain Demand Intelligence Platform — Workforce-Linked Demand module

erp_integration.integration_description: Scheduled data extraction of production order data, MRP outputs, and inventory position records. Extraction initiated from Lichen side via SAP standard export functionality or a lightweight extraction agent with service account credentials scoped to relevant SAP data objects. Data transmitted over encrypted SFTP or HTTPS to OptiChain ingestion API. No persistent authenticated session into SAP maintained.
erp_integration.reviewer_note: ERP integration description is ambiguous. Vendor states no persistent SAP session but references a possible extraction agent with service account credentials. It is unclear whether this constitutes Tier 2 (mediated) or Tier 3 (indirect/file-based) under ISP-001 §12.2. IT Security must review and formally assign an integration tier before onboarding proceeds.

additional_system_access.note: Vendor does not require direct integration with workforce management platform; governed export process managed by Lichen IT is sufficient.

data_categories_in_scope: Production order and manufacturing schedule data (SAP S/4HANA exports)
MRP outputs and inventory position records (SAP S/4HANA exports)
Workforce scheduling and shift assignment data including employee identifiers and shift schedules for EU-based facilities
Demand forecast outputs and model performance metrics (generated by OptiChain; owned by Lichen)

data_subjects.processing_purpose: Predictor variable in demand forecasting model to correlate workforce availability with production output capacity. Not used for HR, performance management, or employment-related purposes by OptiChain.
data_subjects.processing_role: Data processor acting on documented instructions from Lichen as data controller
data_subjects.legal_basis_assessment: Lichen as controller determines applicable legal basis; anticipated to be legitimate interests or contractual necessity under GDPR Art. 6
data_subjects.reviewer_note: Confirmed: OptiChain will process personal data of EU-based Lichen employees. Triggers DPA Legal Trigger Matrix row A-01 (GDPR Art. 28 DPA required) and row E-01 (system/data access with personal data in scope). GDPR Art. 28 DPA is a hard blocker. Legal must execute before any data exchange proceeds.

data_retention.retention_period: Active contract term plus 90-day transition period post-termination
data_retention.deletion_timeline_post_transition: Within 30 days of transition period expiry

pci_dss.note: OptiChain does not process payment card data

access_control.access_scoping: Restricted to personnel with documented business need (support, implementation, SRE roles)
access_control.access_revocation_sla: Within one business day of role change or termination

encryption.in_transit: TLS 1.2 minimum; TLS 1.3 for all new integrations

nda_details.status_as_of_submission: Draft transmitted by OptiChain; not yet countersigned by Lichen as of 2024-03-04
nda_details.reviewer_note: NDA STATUS: PROVISIONAL. ISP-001 §12.1.4 requires NDA execution before the information-exchange phase may proceed. Onboarding may not advance to data sharing or integration planning until Procurement confirms fully executed NDA. Owner: Procurement / Legal.

dpa_details.reviewer_note: GDPR Art. 28 DPA is a hard blocker per DPA Legal Trigger Matrix rows A-01 and E-01. Legal must execute before any data exchange proceeds.

internal_review_summary.reviewed_by: Lichen IT Security, Legal, and Procurement

blocking_items.required_action: IT Security to request architecture diagram from OptiChain. Assign tier before integration planning proceeds.

blocking_items.issue: GDPR Art. 28 DPA not yet executed
blocking_items.policy_reference: DPA Legal Trigger Matrix — rows A-01, E-01
blocking_items.required_action: Legal to execute Art. 28 DPA before any EU employee data is exchanged. Hard blocker.
Procurement to confirm NDA execution with OptiChain's legal counterpart. Information-exchange phase blocked until confirmed.
